items.caption: A promotional brochure for a gps tracking system. it features a black gps device with a long antenna on the left side, set against a blue background with a white e-tracker logo at the top. the brochure outlines the technical specifications of the gps tracker, including dimensions, weight, standby battery life, operating temperature, and power consumption. it also highlights the features of the gps tracker, such as gps, gprs, gsm, and wireless network connectivity. the brochure is designed to showcase the capabilities of the gps tracking system and its suitability for various applications.
